name: Piquant African Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 lb boneless, skinless turkey breast, cut into 1/2-inch cubes
2 tbsp sliced, seeded, fresh jalapeno peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate the turkey in lemon juice, covered, overnight in the refrigerator.
2. Remove turkey from marinade and reserve lemon juice.
3. Heat olive oil in a 2- to 3-quart wide bottom, nonstick saucepan over medium heat.
4. Sauté onions for a few minutes until slightly softened.
5. Add ginger and sauté for 1 minute more.
6. Stir in tomatoes, reserved lemon juice, thyme, bay leaf, jalapeno peppers, and salt.
7. Cover and bring to a low simmer. Lower the heat and simmer for 30 minutes.
8. Add turkey and continue simmering for 2 minutes.
9. Stir in rice and return to a low simmer. Cover and gently simmer for 18 minutes without lifting the lid.
10. Remove pan from heat, uncover, and stir mixture briefly.
11. Cover and allow to stand for 5 minutes.
12. Uncover and discard bay leaf. Place contents in serving dish and sprinkle with parsley.
Makes: 4 servings
